name: NuScale Power Corporation
description: NuScale Power Corporation is a leading provider of proprietary and innovative small modular reactor (SMR) nuclear technology. The company's mission is to provide scalable, safe, and reliable carbon-free energy to help power the global energy transition. Its flagship NuScale Power Module is a small, pressurized water reactor capable of generating 77 megawatts of electricity, designed to be factory-fabricated and transported to sites. NuScale's technology is the first and only SMR design to receive approval from the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission, positioning the company as a pioneer in the advanced nuclear sector.
